title: News from the Beacon - July 10, 2026
description: Pilot news segment. Four signals from Captain's worlds, verified with dates and sources: whooping cranes raising chicks in Jefferson Davis Parish (flock up to ~75); a  draft plan to rebuild Raccoon Island, a pelican/tern/skimmer colony off the Terrebonne-Lafourche coast; Anthropic's July 6 'global workspace' interpretability finding inside Claude; and NASA Lucy's wobbling peanut asteroid with signs of ancient water. Plus a wry note on podcast launches hitting an eight-year low.
